title: Korak 13

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
INF = float('inf')
adj_matrix = [
    [0, 5, 3, INF, 11, INF],
    [5, 0, 1, INF, INF, 2],
    [3, 1, 0, 1, 5, INF],
    [INF, INF, 1, 0, 9, 3],
    [11, INF, 5, 9, 0, INF],
    [INF, 2, INF, 3, INF, 0],
]

def shortest_path(matrix, start_node, target_node=None):
    n = len(matrix)
    distances = [INF] * n
    distances[start_node] = 0
    paths = [[node_no] for node_no in range(n)]
    visited = [False] * n

    for _ in range(n):
        min_distance = INF  
        current = -1  
        for node_no in range(n):  
            if not visited[node_no] and distances[node_no] < min_distance:  
                pass

INF = float('inf')
adj_matrix = [
    [0, 5, 3, INF, 11, INF],
    [5, 0, 1, INF, INF, 2],
    [3, 1, 0, 1, 5, INF],
    [INF, INF, 1, 0, 9, 3],
    [11, INF, 5, 9, 0, INF],
    [INF, 2, INF, 3, INF, 0],
]

def shortest_path(matrix, start_node, target_node=None):
    n = len(matrix)
    distances = [INF] * n
    distances[start_node] = 0
    paths = [[node_no] for node_no in range(n)]
    visited = [False] * n

    for _ in range(n):
        min_distance = INF  
        current = -1  
        for node_no in range(n):  
            if not visited[node_no] and distances[node_no] < min_distance:  
                pass

description:
Ako je matematičko tvrdnje koje ste dodali tačno, to znači da je trenutni čvor optimalan neposeta izbor koji ste do sada pronašli i morate ispraviti svoje parametre kako biste to pokazali.

Unutar bloka if, ažuriraj min_distance na distances[node_no] i postavi current na node_no.
